entities.name: EMAIL_GENERATOR_STYLE_CONSTRAINTS.md

relationships.context: V's emails naturally compress to 200-300 words
V uses em-dashes extensively as signature style
Language Echoing reviews phrasePool to select high-confidence phrases
Link Insertion uses Link Map with confidence threshold ≥ 0.75
Resonant Detail is component 2 of the 6-part email structure
Readability measured via FK score with max threshold of 10
